description_long: This object is a compact, semi-automatic handgun with a matte black metal frame and a dark brown wooden grip. The barrel is cylindrical and extends slightly beyond the slide, with a visible muzzle opening at the front. The grip panels are secured with screws and have a polished finish, contrasting with the rest of the matte body. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a curved trigger, while the slide features subtle serrations for improved handling. The rear of the object includes a hammer and a rear sight, both integrated into the upper assembly. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black handgun with a dark brown wooden grip and a rounded trigger guard. The design is sleek and utilitarian, featuring a visible barrel and integrated sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle opening and the alignment of the barrel with the slide.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full profile, including the wooden grip, trigger guard, and slide serrations.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the hammer, rear sight, and the back of the grip.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other grip panel and the overall symmetry of the frame.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length for a handgun
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
